summary: Emits floating-point values from a runtime slider control.
description: Slider Float is a panel control node for performer-facing numeric input. Incoming values can update it, and moving the runtime slider emits a typed value event without creating a graph patch.
runtimeBehavior: Runtime slider changes update the control state and emit number.float/f32 from value. in updates and emits, set updates silently, and bang emits the current value.

ports.description: Updates the slider value and emits number.float/f32.
Updates the slider value without output.
Emits the current slider value as number.float/f32.

params.description: Text shown on the runtime control.
Initial slider value saved in the graph.
Optional number.float/f32 channel name updated whenever the slider emits.
Optional number.float/f32 channel name used to receive routed slider updates.

example.title: Drive a shader uniform
example.description: Connect Slider F32 directly to a shader input or give it sendName for named routing.
